SELECT sys_stat('st_dbms_sec') FROM (SELECT sys_stat('st_dbms_name') AS name) AS t;
SELECT sys_stat('st_dbms_name') FROM sys_tables WHERE table_name = 'example_table' LIMIT 1;
SELECT sys_stat('st_db_load') FROM (SELECT sys_stat('st_dbms_ver') AS version) AS ver;
CREATE TABLE example_table (id INT, name VARCHAR(255));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM example_table WHERE name = (SELECT name FROM sys_stat('st_dbms_name'));
SELECT * FROM example_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT 1 AS id) AS subquery);
SELECT concat(sys_stat('st_dbms_name'), ' version: ', (SELECT sys_stat('st_dbms_ver'))) AS full_info;
CREATE TABLE stats_log (log_id INT, stat_name VARCHAR(255), stat_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO stats_log (log_id, stat_name, stat_value) VALUES (1, 'name', sys_stat('st_dbms_name'));
INSERT INTO stats_log (log_id, stat_name, stat_value) VALUES (2, 'version', sys_stat('st_dbms_ver'));
SELECT * FROM stats_log WHERE stat_value LIKE (SELECT '%' || sys_stat('st_dbms_name') || '%');
